# Pricing Card
Marketing pricing tier card with feature list and CTA.
## Import
```tsx
import { PricingCard } from "@/components/ui/pricing-card";
```
## Usage
```tsx
<PricingCard name="Pro" price="$29" highlighted variant={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **name** (string) — default: `"Pro"`: Plan name
- **price** (string) — default: `"$29"`: Price
- **highlighted** (boolean) — default: `true`: Highlighted
- **variant** (string): Variant
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add pricing-card
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/pricing-card
```
